title: styrax platanifolius subsp. stellatus
intro: Styrax platanifolius subsp. stellatus, also known as starry styrax, is a plant species in the Styrax genus, belonging to the family Styracaceae, native to the subtropical regions of China. The plant's bark and leaves have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Styrax platanifolius subsp. stellatus include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. The plant's bark can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for medicinal use, while its leaves can be dried and made into capsules or tablets for easier consumption.
